title: Bitter Caramelized Kenyan Sweet Potato Stir-fry
description: A light and lazy Sunday dish featuring bitter sweet potatoes caramelized with chilli powder in a halal-friendly recipe.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons of butter or coconut oil
Water (enough to cover the sweet potatoes)

instructions: Place the cubed sweet potato in a baking dish, drizzle with butter and sprinkle chilli powder over it. Mix well.
Pour enough water to cover half of the sweet potatoes evenly across them. Cover the dish lightly with aluminum foil.
Bake for about 35-40 minutes until the sweet potato is tender but not mushy.
Remove from oven, leave covered and let cool slightly. Once cooled, unplug the heat source or turn off your cooking appliance.
Take out the sweet potatoes and use a fork to mash them gently. Add salt if needed and mix well.
Serve hot with any favorite sauce or dip you prefer.
